title: The Big Bang Of AI Just Happened: Cosmos 3
summary: NVIDIA launched Cosmos 3, a world model trained on video, audio, text, and action data for physical AI applications. The system is part of a broader stack including Vera (an AI agent CPU layer) and Isaac GR00T (a humanoid robot platform) designed to enable robots to perceive, plan, and act in real-world environments.
